freshness: current binary build with mocked Go tests

scenarios.description: All adapter behaviors verified with mocked HTTP providers
scenarios.evidence: 22 required test functions pass in internal/gitcode/...; 9 service-layer supporting tests pass

scenarios.description: Each test inspects exact HTTP request shape, response decoding, diagnostic classification, and cache record fields
scenarios.evidence: Key tests verify HTTP request paths/methods (e.g. TestScenario018PRListDetailCommentsRoutes captures paths), response decoding (TestScenario017AddCommentLiveShapeCachesComment decodes {id, note_id, body}), diagnostic classification (TestEmptyWikiDetection400 checks DiagnosticCode() == 'empty_wiki', TestScenario017AddCommentMalformedBodyDiagnosticHTTPAttempted checks HTTPAttempted=true), and cache record fields (TestScenario018PRListDetailCommentsRoutes verifies Kind/SourceID/Number/ID/Labels/Base/Head)

observations.issue: Tautological assertion `len(wikis.Items) < 0` at line 2042-2043 — this can never be true. The assertion never fails, meaning the test does not actually check for committed items on cancellation. The test still validates the error type check (context.Canceled) and is not a blocking defect.

Does not separately assert http_attempted on WriteResult because WriteResult does not carry an HTTPAttempted field. http_attempted is tracked at the service/diagnostics layer and tested in TestScenario017AddCommentMalformedBodyDiagnosticHTTPAttempted.
